title: alter column to set the same constraint
poc: create table atacc1 (test int not null);
alter table atacc1 alter bar set not null;
key_bug_features: alter column to set the same constraint
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, age INT CHECK (age >= 0));
ALTER TABLE test_table ALTER name SET NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE test_table ALTER age SET NOT NULL;
